version_description: All lyrics with their accompanying correctly named chords. Tablature of main riff and Bridge section. Full lyrics for Coda https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gF5LaVkDhyk.

versions.version_description: Full song with riff, chords, solo and lyrics.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Song: Run to you
Artist: Bryan Adams
Composers: Bryan Adams and Jim Vallance
Album: Reckless

Tabbed by DJ  7th Nov 2023

CAPO: 2nd fret
(Will then sound in the recorded key of F#m)

IMPORTANT INFO:
There are two variations for the voicings of both
the C and the G chords, they are differentiated in
the chord sheet with an asterisk.
The E7's are actually an E7(no3), but for neatness
they are shown just as E7.

IGNORE THE CHORD BOX DIAGRAMS that the website
displays, they are generated automatically from a
generic database and often don't show the best
option for a particular chord progression. Just use
the voicings suggested in the text column numbers

E7    = 020xxx   Bm7 = x20232    E4  = xxx455
G *   = 320xxx   Em  = 022000    E   = xxx454
Aadd4 = 540xxx   G   = 320033    D4  = xx0233
C     = x32010   A   = x02220    C4  = xxx011
D     = xx0232                   C * = xxx010

N.C. = No chords

Please take a second to scroll down to the bottom of
the page and select a star rating for my tab, thanks
=====================================================
[Intro - See bottom of page for riff tablature]
[tab]  [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] *   [ch]Aadd4[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] *   [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
| /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] *      [ch]Aadd4[/ch]    [ch]E7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] *  [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
   She says her love for me could never die,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch] *        [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
   But that'd change if she ever found out...[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E7[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch] *  [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
About you and I,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
    Oh, but her love is cold,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
    It wouldn't hurt her if she didn't know,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                         
'Cause   ...when it gets too much...[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch]
 ...I need to feel your touch[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you-----,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you-----,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause when the feeling's right...[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run all night,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   N.C.
I'm gonna run to you-----![/tab]

[Break - See bottom of page for riff tablature]

| /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / | /  /  /  / |[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch] *      [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
    She's got a heart of gold, [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] *  [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
She'd never let me down,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]                                 [ch]G[/ch] *      [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
    But you're the one that always turns me on,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch] *   [ch]Aadd4[/ch]
You keep me coming 'round,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
    I know her love is true,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
But it's so damn easy making love to you,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
   I got my mind made up ...I need to feel your touch[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you-----,      yeah,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you-----,[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
'Cause when the feeling's right...[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run all night,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you-----,      yeah, [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
I'm gonna run to you-----,      oh,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]
When the feeling's right I'm gonna run all night,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]   N.C.
I'm gonna run to you-----![/tab]
